claim: Bright colors are a notable 2025 glasses trend.
excerpt: Bright pinks and blues ... and jewel tones are some of the most notable options for glasses in the coming year.

claim: Small oval and rectangle Y2K-inspired glasses remain popular through 2025.
excerpt: Small oval and rectangle glasses saw a resurgence in 2024 and are expected to remain popular through 2025.

claim: Oversized, chunky, shield and cat-eye styles are highlighted for 2025.
excerpt: King-size styles are likely to include futuristic shields, flashy cat-eyes, and bold, chunky frames.
Wire frames, rimless and semi-rimless ... Transparent frames are also having their moment.

claim: Smart glasses combine camera, AI, communication and speakers.
excerpt: Smart glasses typically feature: an HD camera ... AI ... Hands-free communication ... High-quality speakers.

claim: Smartglasses are wearable computers with augmented information overlays.
excerpt: Smartglasses ... are eye or head-worn wearable computers ... many include displays that add information alongside what the wearer sees.

claim: Vogue trend hub includes current 2026 fashion trend coverage.
excerpt: Fashion Trends... Latest in Trends ... Fall 2026 ... Pre-Fall 2026.
source_title: Fashion Trends: What's In For Spring, Summer, Fall, and Winter
